home.title: Meena link shortener
home.heroDescription: Paste any long URL below. We will create a compact Meena Health shortcut you can share.
home.copyFailedToast: Could not copy — check browser permissions.

errors.invalid: That does not look like a valid URL
errors.network: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
errors.unexpectedResponse: We could not read the short link from the server. Try again or contact support.

errors.phoneInvalidSaudi: Mobile number must start with 5 and be a valid Saudi number

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.successMessage: Payment successful! Thank you for your order.
checkout.paymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
checkout.paymentNotConfigured: Payment is not configured. Please contact support.

auth.description: Sign in to your account to access the Meena Intranet
